rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL JOHN SHANNON VS. WASHINGTON MUTUAL, INC. (DBA WASHINGTON MUTUAL et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 07, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL SHANNON's Motion For Reconsideration. Deny. 1) Bankruptcy filing was in existence at time of original hearing; 2) Plaintiff's reorganization plan of 12/21/12 should have included bond amount per this Court's order of 11/13/12 so Bankruptcy Court can exercise judicial comity. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FRANK STONICH et al VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 07, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH LEE et al VS. NARANJIBHAI R PATEL et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 07, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANTS NARANJIBHAI PATEL AND INDIRABEN PATEL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Continued to January 30, 2013. Moving party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C no later than January 11, 2013. = (501/REQ)
